heading: UNIFORM ELECTION DATES
operative_text: Except as otherwise provided by this subchapter, each general or special election in this state shall be held on one of the following dates: (1) the first Saturday in May in an odd-numbered year; (2) the first Saturday in May in an even-numbered year, for an election held by a political subdivision other than a county, or ordered by the governor; or (3) the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November.
_note: Subsections (b)-(d) contain exceptions and additional operative provisions; full text includes repeal of subsection (e) and legislative history. No defined terms explicitly defined within this section.
